_publications._publicationTitle: Overcoming BET Inhibitor Resistance in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: we generated Brd4-depleted mouse MPNST (mMPNST) cell clones that offer different levels of BRD4 expression...resulted in loss of BRD4 protein expression
details: Successfully detected BRD4 protein expression levels and depletion in Western blot analysis across multiple cell lines and treatment conditions
